items.title: 9to5Toys Battlestation Weekly – Prime Day edition: Biggest deals on PCs, monitors, gaming gear, and more
items.summary:
Welcome to 9to5Toys Battlestation Weekly – your go-to spot for the notable deals and latest releases in PC gaming at a glance every Saturday morning. With Prime Day about to wrap up, we are getting this week’s roundup out a little early so you still have time to grab the best deals before they disappear. From deals on RTX 50-series gaming PCs, handhelds, and OLED monitors to all-time lows on storage, networking gear, and other gaming accessories, there is a lot to browse through this time around. We have rounded up the best offers, which are still up for grabs below, so get ’em while they are hot.

Final 24 hours of Amazon’s massive 2026 Prime Day starts now: Apple, Anker, LEGO, Android gear, more

items.title: Last chance Apple Prime Day deals from $24: AirPods Pro 3 $70 off, Apple Watch $150 off, MacBooks up to $850 off, more
items.summary: Amazon’s 2026 Prime Day sale still has plenty of deals left in the tank before the whole thing closes down for another year, but some of the best Apple deals are already starting to sell out or jump back up in price. Fortunately, we are still tracking a solid $70 price drop on AirPods Pro 3 to deliver one of the best deals ever, as well as up to $150 off the most affordable and popular Apple Watch Series 11 models. Apple has raised the price on its current generation MacBook lineup substantially (as much as $500) but there are still some models down with Prime Day pricing at as much as much $850 under the price you’ll pay Apple (if you move fast, they are disappearing every minute). All of that and a bunch more awaits below as part of our last minute Apple Prime Day deals collection.

items.title: Get $1,000 ultrawide Samsung Odyssey monitor vibes for half the price now with this 49-inch 5K2K curved display at $500
items.summary: INNOCN’s official Amazon storefront is offering its 49-inch 5K2K curved ultrawide gaming monitor for $499.99 shipped for Prime Day. This model originally carried an $875 price tag and has more recently been selling for around $795 at Amazon, making today’s offer a $295 discount from its usual going rate. It also lands it $40 below the previous all-time low we tracked for it during last year’s Black Friday sale. It delivers much of the same big-screen Samsung Odyssey experience without hitting the $1,000 mark, so it’s definitely worth considering if you’re on a tight budget.

What we love

If you’re short on counter space but can’t live without your morning coffee, the Keurig K-Mini is an easy pick. At just $50, this compact single-serve brewer fits just about anywhere. It’s quick, easy to use, and doesn’t take up valuable kitchen space, making it one of our favorite budget-friendly coffee makers. At 38% off, this Prime Day price can’t be beat.
